criteria.label: Style authority and product context
criteria.pass_evidence: Checks product context, component role, and motion policy first.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Applies flashy default animation without product need.

criteria.label: Reference selection
criteria.pass_evidence: Selects motion quality, interaction physics, design-system, and validation references.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Ignores gesture guidance or loads unrelated references.

criteria.label: Anti-generic redesign
criteria.pass_evidence: Questions whether motion should exist and avoids decorative animation.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Treats more animation as automatically better.

criteria.label: Evidence level labeling
criteria.pass_evidence: Labels timing and performance evidence as static, observed, or unverified.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Claims smoothness or runtime performance without browser evidence.

criteria.label: Verified/unverified boundary
criteria.pass_evidence: Separates inspected behavior from unverified focus, reduced-motion, and interruption.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Claims interaction states without testing them.

criteria.label: Concrete design moves
criteria.pass_evidence: Proposes transform tracking, interruption, velocity handoff, boundaries, and reduced motion.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Says only to make it smoother or recommends transition-all.

criteria.label: Scope control and unrelated changes
criteria.pass_evidence: Keeps recommendations within motion behavior and decisive validation.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Suggests unrelated changes or buries priorities in an overlong review.
